strategy.name: Refined Momentum Filter v2
strategy.rationale: Tighter RSI bands and stronger momentum threshold reduce choppy entries. Wider trail and higher target let winners run. Extended hold captures continuation moves missed by v1.

history.analysis: Strong PF 4.41 with 62.5% WR. Stops hit 3x on counter-trend entries. Two time-exits left profit on table. Trail captured less than targets. Main issue: entries lack volume/trend confirmation, causing early stop-outs.
mistakes: Three stop losses suggest entries against short-term momentum despite indicator alignment — RSI band too wide allows choppy entries
Two time-exits near profit suggest maxHoldMinutes too short or take-profit too tight for trend continuation
Trailing stop at 0.5% too tight — BTC trail exit $21 vs target $60+ potential, cutting winners short
No volume or ATR filter allows entries in low-momentum consolidation phases where stops get clipped
changes: Tighten RSI long entry to 48-58 and short to 42-52 to avoid choppy midrange noise
Increase takeProfitPct from 1.5% to 2.0% to let winners run further, improving avgW
Widen trailingStopPct from 0.5% to 0.8% to reduce premature trail exits on BTC volatility
Extend maxHoldMinutes from 120 to 180 to capture time-exit trades that were still moving
Add stronger momentum filter (period 10 > 0.2) to avoid flat momentum entries that caused stop-outs
